steps.title: Replace the repeated ratio
steps.content: The second equation contains $\frac{x}{y}$. Rewrite it as $$\frac{24x}{ny}=\frac{24}{n}\cdot\frac{x}{y}=4$$

steps.title: Substitute the known value
steps.content: Since $\frac{x}{y}=4$, substitute $4$: $$\frac{24}{n}\cdot 4=4$$ Divide both sides by $4$ to get $$\frac{24}{n}=1$$

steps.title: Solve for n
steps.content: $\frac{24}{n}=1$ means the numerator and denominator must be equal, so $n=24$. This also makes the original second expression $\frac{24x}{24y}=\frac{x}{y}=4$, which checks. Enter 24.
